text:
Tanhai
Shab mein hai hazeen kya
Anjum
Nahin tere hum-nasheen kya
!

Yeh
Rifat-e-asman khamosh
Khwabeeda
Zameen, jahan khamosh
Yeh
Chand, yeh dasht-o-dar, yeh kohsar
Fitrat
Hai tamam nastaran zaar
Moti
Khush-rang, pyare pyare
Yaani
Tere aansuon ke taare
Kis
Shay ki tujhe hawas hai ae dil
!
Qudrat
Teri hum-nafas hai ae dil
!
